name: Monica Leed
body:
Hi Monica — running a small affiliate operation called Golden Home Project (@golden_home_project / goldenhomeproject.com). Saw your book Simply Spaced — your aesthetic-first organizing approach is exactly the niche we're built for.

What I have wired up: live Impact partnerships with Mamma Mia Covers (24-30% commission), Eli & Elm (20%), Best Choice Products (15%), Syruvia (20%). Plus a vetted Amazon ASIN pool and Meta DM automation that converts post comments into product DMs.

What I don't have is your audience.

Proposing a 30-day test: pick one product or transformation you'd post anyway. I handle the affiliate routing + DM follow-up funnel, we split commissions 50/50. No upfront, no contract. If it doesn't earn we both walk.

Open to a quick chat?

— Ian, GHP

name: Jen Jones
body:
Hi Jen — running a small affiliate operation called Golden Home Project (@golden_home_project / goldenhomeproject.com). Saw your Etsy shop and DIY content — you've clearly built the front-end at scale already.

Wanted to pitch you something concrete rather than another cold collab ask. We'd never compete with your products; the play is incremental affiliate income on content you're already shipping.

What I have wired up: live Impact partnerships with Mamma Mia Covers (24-30% commission), Eli & Elm (20%), Best Choice Products (15%), Syruvia (20%). Plus a vetted Amazon ASIN pool and a Meta DM automation that converts post comments into product DMs.

Proposing a 30-day test: pick one product or transformation you'd post anyway, I handle the affiliate routing + DM follow-up, we split commissions 50/50. No upfront, no contract.

Open to a quick chat?

— Ian, GHP
